TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Ripon, title = Ripon, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ripon} }

S.FORM: Itini i 36 00 N, 138 00 E, noAsiya ko Japan . Polong no sekalay i 377,915 sq km "saka 62 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 364,485 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 13,430 sq km " Polong i 126,702,133 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 12.50%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 68.50%, malo no roma to a sera 19%. siyoto O Tokyo ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa ko safaw 23 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Akihito , patirengan a romi'ad i 1989 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 7 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: itini i ** ** n, *** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u *apan . po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i ***,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **%. sijo~uto~u o~u to~ukjo~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakato~usa ko~u safaw ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i akińßito~u , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Itini i 36 00 N, 138 00 E, noAsiya ko Japan . Polong no sekalay i 377,915 sq km "saka 62 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 364,485 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 13,430 sq km " Polong i 126,702,133 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 12.50%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 68.50%, malo no roma to a sera 19%. siyoto O Tokyo ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa ko safaw 23 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Akihito , patirengan a romi'ad i 1989 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 7 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, **,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i ***,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **%. sijo~uto~u o~u to~ukjo~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakato~usa ko~u safaw ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i akińßito~u , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
